projectDescription: A browser-based DJ set planning tool that auto-generates an energy arc from your track list and lets you drag songs between phases while scoring every transition in real time.
keyFeatures: Auto-generate a stage-based energy arc from a pasted track list
Drag-and-drop tracks between phases like index cards on a studio wall
Real-time transition scoring (BPM continuity, key compatibility, energy smoothness)
Live arc chart comparing ideal vs. current board order
Track Inspector to manually correct auto-detected tags
Crate for staging alternate tracks without committing them to the board
Smart recommendations: best crate picks per phase, arc warnings, boundary checks
Tunable priority engine (BPM, Camelot, energy, arc fit, vibe, vocals)
Save/load full boards as JSON; export to CSV
Fully local — no account, no server, no cloud sync
publicApiSurface: Priority sliders: BPM continuity, Key compatibility, Energy smoothness, Arc fit, Vibe continuity, Vocals continuity
Track Inspector fields: BPM, Key, Energy, Role (SETTLE/SIMMER/NUDGE/SPIKE/RELEASE), Vocals (LOW/MID/HIGH), Drums (SOFT/ROLLING/PUNCHY), Vibe (ORGANIC/MELODIC/INDIE/DARK/RAVEY)
Transition badge scores and technique labels
Phase columns: Introduction, Early Groove, Lift, Peak, Landing
